variables.input: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == "AcmeTech" | fields json.companyName | dedup json.companyName

fetch bizevents 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName
| fields json.journeyType | dedup json.journeyType
fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter json.companyName == "AcmeTech" | fields json.stepName | dedup json.stepName

fetch bizevents
| fields json.serviceName, json.companyName, json.journeyType
| summarize count(),by:{json.companyName, json.journeyType, json.serviceName}
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType)
| dedup json.serviceName
| fields json.serviceName = lower(json.serviceName)
| filter isNotNull(json.serviceName)

smartscapeNodes PROCESS
| lookup [smartscapeNodes SERVICE | fields id, name], sourceField:name, lookupField:name, prefix:"svc."
| lookup [timeseries cpu = avg(dt.process.cpu.usage), by:{dt.smartscape.process}], sourceField:id, lookupField:dt.smartscape.process, fields:{cpu}
| filter isNotNull(cpu)
| fieldsAdd LowerService = lower(name)
| filter in(LowerService, $Service)
| fields id
| dedup id

0.content:
# SRE Support Operations Dashboard
## AcmeTech | Support Journey | Technology
**Data Signals:** 🔧 Services
---

3.title: Average Response Time
3.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.responseTime)

4.title: Success Rate
4.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), success = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false) | fieldsAdd rate = round((toDouble(success)/toDouble(total))*100, decimals:2)

5.title: Error Rate
5.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), errors = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true) | fieldsAdd rate = round((toDouble(errors)/toDouble(total))*100, decimals:2)

7.title: Resolution Hours by Category
7.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.category) | summarize count = count(), by: {additionalfields.category} | sort count desc | limit 10

8.title: Ticket Priority Breakdown
8.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.ticketPriority) | summarize count = count(), by: {additionalfields.ticketPriority} | sort count desc | limit 10

10.title: SRE Team Assignees
10.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = count()
